text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Convergence Stack (每 Warp)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Top: Reconvergence PC, Mask

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 分支时压栈

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Top: Reconvergence PC, Mask

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 分支时压栈

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Pre-Volta (Pascal 及更早):

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 使用硬件栈管理汇合:

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 遇到分支:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 1. 计算汇合点 PC (通常是 if-else 后的第一条指令)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 2. 将 {汇合点 PC, 全量 Mask} 压入栈

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 3. 先执行 THEN 路径 (Active Mask = 满足条件的线程)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 4. THEN 路径执行完 → 弹栈 → 切换到 ELSE 路径

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 5. ELSE 路径执行完 → 弹栈 → 到达汇合点 → 全量 Mask 恢复

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 问题: 嵌套分支 → 栈深度增加; 循环中的分支 → 锁步限制

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Volta+ (独立线程调度):

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 没有硬件栈。每个线程有独立的 PC。

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Warp Scheduler 使用 "Convergence Optimizer" 硬件:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 动态检测哪些线程在同一 PC 位置

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 将它们组合成一个 "子 Warp" 执行

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 在分支后尝试让线程尽快重新汇合

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 这允许了 Pre-Volta 不可能的模式:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - Warp 内的生产者-消费者 (线程 0 产出数据, 线程 1 消费)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - Warp 内的互斥锁 (需要 __syncwarp 配合)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 不同线程执行不同的循环迭代次数
